title: Fix black background hiding content and ensure proper color visibility

requirements.text: Fix the black background issue throughout the entire app. Replace all black or near-black background colors with appropriate light or themed backgrounds (ivory, cream, white, or the design system's defined background tokens) so that all content — text, buttons, cards, forms, headers — is fully visible and readable.

quotes: not looking anything background color is black it hides everything
fix the black background and ensure all content is properly visible with good color contrast throughout the app

acceptanceCriteria: No page in the app has a solid black (#000 or near-black) background that obscures content
All text has sufficient contrast against its background (WCAG AA minimum)
Landing page, dashboard, create wizard, invitation editor, and guest invitation page are all visually legible
Header, navigation, cards, forms, and buttons are all fully visible without requiring user action
The app uses the existing design system color tokens (ivory, crimson, gold, rose, charcoal) consistently

requirements.text: Audit and fix CSS custom properties and Tailwind color token definitions in frontend/index.css and frontend/src/index.css to ensure that the default (light) theme does not apply dark/black background values. Ensure the --background and --foreground CSS variables, as well as any body or root background styles, are set to appropriate light theme values by default.

quotes: background color is black it hides everything

acceptanceCriteria: The CSS --background variable resolves to a light color (e.g., ivory or white) in the default theme
The body element does not have a black or near-black background in the default state
Dark mode variables do not bleed into the light/default theme
All pages render with a visible background immediately on load without any flash of black

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Preserve the existing design system color palette (gold, crimson, ivory, charcoal, rose)
Do not remove or restructure the existing routing or component hierarchy
nonGoals: Changing the overall visual theme or branding
